title: Vera Bradley Q2 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Vera Bradley's Q2 fiscal 2024 earnings call highlighted meaningful year-over-year improvement in earnings driven by significant gross margin expansion and successful expense reduction efforts. Consolidated net revenues totaled $128.2 million with net income of $9.3 million or $0.30 per diluted share. The company narrowed its fiscal 2024 outlook, expecting net revenues between $490 million and $500 million compared to prior range of up to $510 million. Gross profit margins improved significantly, and inventory was reduced 22.4% year-over-year. Project Restoration continued to drive operational efficiency and margin improvement.
